/usr/bin/ar qc libsbert_core.a CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/BertIndex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/HnswConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/ShardedIndex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/BertIndexManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/Util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/OffsetFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/FileLock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/SBertGGML.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/hf_mapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/StringEmbedding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/FileStreamCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_core.dir/src/unified_hnsw.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsbert_core.a
